== Notes for [[Item:Q102580|Q102580]] ==

1. Gil, Moshe. ‘The Exilarchate’, pp 33-65 in The Jews of Medieval Islam, ed. by Daniel Frank. E.J. Brill (1995).

2. Goode, Alexander D. ‘The Exilarchate in the Eastern Caliphate’, article in “Jewish Quarterly Review”, vol. 31, no. 2, 1940-1, pp 149-169.

3. Lazarus, Felix. ‘Die Haupter der Vertriebenen’, article in “Jahrbucher fur Judische Geschicte und Literatur”, vol. 10, 1890, pp 174-179.

4. Le Strange, G. The Lands of the Eastern Caliphate. Cambridge UP (1905).

5. Neubauer, Adolf. Mediaeval Jewish Chronicles. Philo Press (1970).

6. Rosenstein, Neil. The Unbroken Chain: biographical sketches and the genealogy of illustrious Jewish families from the 15th-20th century. 2 vols. rev. edn. CIS Pub. (1990).

7. Roth, Cecil (ed.). The Encyclopedia Judaica. 16 vols. Keter Pub. House (1971-2).

8. Valle Rodriguez, Carlos del. El Orden De Las Generaciones = Seder ha-Dorot. Aben Ezra Ediciones (1997).

9. Wein, Berel [Rabbi]. Herald of Destiny: The Story of the Jews in the Medieval Era 750-1650. Shaar Press (1993).

http://www.alsadiqin.org/en/index.php?title=Table_1._Babylonian_Exilarchs

REFERENCE_NUMBERS:
geni:6000000012362675075

[[Category:GEDCOM Notes Pages]][[Category:Pages]]
